daily_summary.headline: SpaceX Launches and Aurora Viewing Opportunities

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | CAS500-2 & Others
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will launch multiple satellites including CAS500-2 and Pelican satellites.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for best experience.

top_events.title: Starship | Flight 12
top_events.description: SpaceX's Starship Flight 12 is scheduled, marking another step in Starship's development.
top_events.action: Stay tuned for updates on this significant test flight.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Potential aurora visibility at high latitudes with Kp index reaching 4.
top_events.action: Check conditions if you're at high latitudes.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
